entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS293) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF OC3 DAA NSC ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1508.01E
2. ADDITION OF XIRRUS WIRELINE SED PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1547.01E.
3. ADDITION OF CSDES IPTEL ICB CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1543.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS297) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF 1G ETHERNET PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1558.01E
2. ADDITION OF ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1552.02E.
3. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET 100M PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1551.03E.
4. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR ISW AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1534.01E.
5. ADDITION OF METRO ETHERNET CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN AU1556.01E.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1531.01E.
2. ADDITION OF ETHERNET ACCESS SERVICE PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1564.01E.
3. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1565.01E.
4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING
DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

2. DELETE RECORDS FROM 6.5-2 AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1570.01S.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS300) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF ONE (1) DELL DEVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1550.01E.
2. PRICE REDUCTION TO REDUCE A NBIP PORT PRICE AND ADD A NEW POP, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1568.01P.
3. ADDITION NINE (9) ACME PACKET SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1569.01E.
4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

3. ADDITION OF SWC ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1582.01E.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:

2. ADDITION OF SED DMRC EARLY TERMINATION ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1572.01E.
3. ADDITION OF MRC PRICING FOR INRS PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1574.01E.
4. ADDITION OF SED PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1578.01E.
5. ADDITION OF MNS ICB PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1580.01E.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
